intent: Authorize and dispatch one provider attempt, preserve response binding, prohibit replay after ambiguity, and select only passing evidence.
positive_scenarios: authorize, arm, dispatch, receive an intact response, evaluate pass, then select
authorize, arm, dispatch, lose the response, then remain indeterminate without replay
receive an intact response and evaluate failure without selecting it
forbidden_scenarios: dispatch before the attempt is armed
dispatch the same attempt again after an indeterminate outcome
evaluate a response whose binding is not intact
select an evaluation that did not pass
anti_vacuity_obligations: Each property antecedent is reachable in at least one frozen scenario.
Both passing and failing evaluation branches are reachable.
The ambiguity branch is reachable after exactly one dispatch.

change_control.rule: Changing intent, properties, source bytes, or oracle requires a new suite version.
